name: kolbo
description: Image/video generation, branded UGC + DTC ads via Marketing Studio, 10-mode product photoshoot, Amazon/Shopify marketplace cards, Visual DNA character training, HTML artifact publishing, full React app generation — via Kolbo AI.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images, video, music, ads, brand assets, and full apps via Kolbo
interface.longDescription: Kolbo AI Skills turn Codex into a creative production agent. Generate high-quality images and videos across 100+ models (Nano Banana, GPT Image 2, Seedance 2, Veo 3.1, Kling, Flux, ...), train reusable Visual DNA characters for face-faithful identity, build branded UGC and DTC ads through Marketing Studio with 9 ad modes, run a 10-mode product photoshoot (studio shot, Pinterest pin, hero banner, ad pack, virtual try-on, conceptual product, restyle, ...), produce marketplace-ready Amazon/Shopify listing cards (main + secondary + A+ content), publish HTML artifacts (presentations, landing pages, dashboards), and ship full React apps via the App Builder. The plugin uses the @kolbo/mcp server for authenticated workflows and returns ready-to-use result URLs.
defaultPrompt: Generate a cinematic product image with Kolbo
Make a 9:16 UGC ad for my new product
Train a Visual DNA character from these photos
Create Amazon main + 5 secondary product cards
Build a landing page for my startup
